pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project will not compile or run correctly on JDK 21 if the source/target compatibility remains at 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Cloud Dependencies BOM to 2023.0.6 to ensure compatibility with Spring Boot 3.3.
pom.xml.why_exists: Version 2022.0.4 is incompatible with Spring Boot 3.3, leading to dependency resolution conflicts or runtime errors.
